description: Code-comprehension QA tasks over the KISS repo corpus. Gold facts are case-insensitive substrings that must appear in the final answer. Derived deterministically via grep/AST on the corpus before the benchmark run.

tasks.prompt: In the file src/kiss/core/useful_tools.py, which functions or methods contain calls to _kill_process_group? List every distinct enclosing function/method name.
In which file is the class UsefulTools defined? Give the path relative to the repo root.
In which file is the class KISSAgent defined (the production class, not tests), and what class does it inherit from?
The function make_skill_tool is defined in src/kiss/agents/sorcar/skills.py. Which other production (non-test) Python file in src/kiss calls it?
Which production (non-test) Python files under src/kiss call the function discover_skills? List all file names.
In which file is the class DockerManager defined? Give the path relative to the repo root.
In src/kiss/core/useful_tools.py, which methods call the module-level helper _format_bash_result? List the distinct enclosing method names.
What is the parent class of SorcarAgent and in which file is that parent class defined?
Which production (non-test) Python files under src/kiss call the function load_skill_content? List all file names.
Which function in src/kiss/agents/sorcar/skills.py uses the private helper _catalog_xml?
In src/kiss/core/useful_tools.py there is a module-level function _bash_parent_repo_guard. Which method calls it?
According to the Skill dataclass docstring in src/kiss/agents/sorcar/skills.py, what are the possible values of the 'source' attribute of a Skill? List them all.
What directory (relative to the kiss package) does bundled_skills_dir() in src/kiss/agents/sorcar/skills.py return, and which script downloads content into it?
Name at least five parameters of the KISSAgent.run method in src/kiss/core/kiss_agent.py.
